creator: tobias.rehbein@web.de
text:
Just after the release of version 0.4.2 a new version has been released. The short upgrade period is caused by an annoying bug whicht prevents the usage of the mouse while playing with X11 support. Lessons learned: Lean back a little time after the release of a new version before porting ;)

	- Upgrade to version 0.4.3
